name: Vyn Development
notes:
klaus@vyn-guesthouse.co.za
Fri, May 16, 10:53 PM (3 days ago)




to Caren, Stafford

Hi Caren, 

Kindly note that the smoke detector in the staff room couldn't be installed. Would you therefore reduce the labor invoice by R 700 + VAT and credit one smoke detector?

Thank you very much.

Best regards
Klaus

name: Update Router firmware (Preferably Locally)
notes:
These are all OvrC projects with Araknis routers that needs firmware updates , some of them are even still running on 2018/2020 firmware . (3x projects Bombed out/disconnected from OvrC already due to firmware)

Preferably update needs to be done locally and VERY important before we update -export and save router configurations to your PC first then once update completes , import and save the config file back to router (new firmware and added features always tend to remove configs or not add them again etc ... )

notes: R2199 ex VAT p month.

, double check configs of beams in hik partner app
